description: User-facing string literals allowed in JSX without a t() wrapper (brand names, email placeholders, etc.). Physical margin/padding utility exceptions also live here. Enforced per requirements.md §10.2 and §10.3.

physicalSpacingExceptions.rationale: ml-auto is a flex-end positioning helper, not a directional margin. In RTL the auto margin still resolves to the end-edge correctly. Flag removed after RTL visual review confirms layout parity (tasks 11.3-11.7).
mr-auto is a flex-start positioning helper, same rationale as ml-auto.
